title: Let's Groove
why_this_song: Let's Groove by Earth, Wind & Fire (1981) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 38 times; first heard in: "It's alright, alright, alright"
Appears 20 times; first heard in: "Let's groove tonight"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "We can boogie down, down, upon down"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "Let this groove, get you to move"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "So stand up, alright, alright"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

Just move yourself and glide like a 747

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "alright" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "alright" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "groove" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: We can boogie down, down, upon down
We can boogie on down, down

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: The boogie down, down, upon down
We boogie on down, on down (boogie!)

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Let's Groove" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Let's Groove" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Let's Groove" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Let's Groove"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Earth, Wind & Fire one question about "Let's Groove", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Earth, Wind & Fire sobre "Let's Groove", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
